summary: Frontend-only testing of HuDent AI Phase 2 Follow-up Center. All 10 feature requirements verified via Playwright against the public URL using admin@dentalflow.it. Dashboard CTA, sidebar link, bottom nav, /recupero queue, send-reminder dialog (4 templates + variable substitution), recent feed with inline status change, and A/B stats dashboard (3 template cards + winner banner + comparative bars) all work as specified. No regressions on dashboard/pazienti/preventivi/appuntamenti/pagamenti.
critical_code_review_comments: FollowupCenter.jsx is ~524 lines with multiple internal components (AbDashboard, TemplateCard, MetricBar, SendReminderForm, RecentReminders). Approaching the 700-line guideline ceiling; consider splitting SendReminderForm and RecentReminders into their own files for maintainability.
SendReminderForm useEffect dependency lint disable — acceptable, but consider using tpl?.body/subject directly in the effect deps to avoid subtle bugs if templates array mutates.

RecentReminders fetches /reminders independently from parent load(); parent calls load() after send which reloads queue+stats but RecentReminders relies on its own load(); wiring via onChange works but could share state via lift-up for consistency.
seed_data_creation: Test sent 1 new reminder via UI (template B switched from A). Status was updated to 'accepted' on the first listed reminder during regression test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Follow-up Center features verified: queue=8 rows, A/B winner=Template A (38.5% vs 25% acceptance in current seed+added data), 4 templates with variable substitution working (studio_name, patient_first_name, estimate_* all rendered). Mobile bottomnav-followup confirmed. Regression on other pages OK. If re-testing, note the seed adds TEST_-prefixed patients which will appear at top of the queue.
